open_data.evidence: No committed open-data source currently provides licensed causal effects, transport weights, and target-population validity measures in one reproducible decision-ready snapshot.
open_data.next_action: Add a licensed causal or health-outcomes dataset with documented source-to-target transform and snapshot policy.
open_data.license_gate: Confirm source license and permission for the causal transform before committing a snapshot.

parity_rationale: The Python implementation is the reference runtime; Rust parity is deferred until causal estimand semantics and cross-language fixture conventions are reviewed.
external_gates: Cross-language conformance and Rust parity review
